title: UFO Whistleblower: Did We Discover Anti-Gravity?
summary: A brief discussion about the history of anti-gravity research in the 1950s-60s, noting how anti-gravity research groups mysteriously disappeared in the early 1960s. The speaker expresses hope that more open study of UAP-related materials could lead to scientific breakthroughs.

events.description: Anti-gravity research groups mysteriously disappeared or 'vaporized' in the early 1960s

key_claims.claim: Serious scientists including Bryce DeWitt were researching anti-gravity in the 1950s
Anti-gravity research groups existed until the early 1960s and then completely disappeared
Quantum gravity research has become a cul-de-sac where no real progress is being made
Current classified programs may not have the strongest intellects due to security-based entry requirements
